verses.latin_vulgate: Viginti quinque annorum erat Joatham cum regnare cœpisset, et sedecim annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Jerusa filia Sadoc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־עֶשְׂרִ֨ים וְחָמֵ֤שׁ שָׁנָה֙ יוֹתָ֣ם בְּמׇלְכ֔וֹ וְשֵׁשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ יְרוּשָׁ֖ה בַּת־צָדֽוֹק׃
verses.douay_rheims: Joatham was five and twenty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Jerusa the daughter of Sadoc.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotam oli viiden ajastaikainen kolmattakymmentä tulessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kuusitoistakymmentä ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa: hänen äitinsä nimi oli Jerusa Zadokin tytär.
verses.king_james: Jotham was twenty and five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name also was Jerushah, the daughter of Zadok.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque quod rectum erat coram Domino, juxta omnia quæ fecerat Ozias pater suus, excepto quod non est ingressus templum Domini : et adhuc populus delinquebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַשׂ הַיָּשָׁ֜ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה כְּכֹ֤ל אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂה֙ עֻזִּיָּ֣הוּ אָבִ֔יו רַ֕ק לֹא־בָ֖א אֶל־הֵיכַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֑ה וְע֥וֹד הָעָ֖ם מַשְׁחִיתִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was right before the Lord, according to all that Ozias his father had done, only that he entered not into the temple of the Lord, and the people still transgressed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki mitä Herralle oli kelvollinen, kaiketi niinkuin hänen isänsä Ussia tehnyt oli, paitsi sitä, ettei hän käynyt Herran templissä, ja kansa turmeli vielä itsensä.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was right in the sight of the Lord, according to all that his father Uzziah did: howbeit he entered not into the temple of the Lord. And the people did yet corruptly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse ædificavit portam domus Domini excelsam, et in muro Ophel multa construxit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֗וּא בָּנָ֛ה אֶת־שַׁ֥עַר בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֖ה הָעֶלְי֑וֹן וּבְחוֹמַ֥ת הָעֹ֛פֶל בָּנָ֖ה לָרֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He built the high gate of the house of the Lord, and on the wall of Ophel he built much.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakensi ylisen portin Herran huoneesen, ja Ophelin muuria hän paljon rakensi.
verses.king_james: He built the high gate of the house of the Lord, and on the wall of Ophel he built much.

verses.latin_vulgate: Urbes quoque ædificavit in montibus Juda, et in saltibus castella et turres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָרִ֥ים בָּנָ֖ה בְּהַר־יְהוּדָ֑ה וּבֶחֳרָשִׁ֣ים בָּנָ֔ה בִּירָנִיּ֖וֹת וּמִגְדָּלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover he built cities in the mountains of Juda, and castles and towers in the forests.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän rakensi kaupungit Juudan vuorelle, ja metsiin rakensi hän linnat ja tornit.
verses.king_james: Moreover he built cities in the mountains of Judah, and in the forests he built castles and towers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse pugnavit contra regem filiorum Ammon, et vicit eos, dederuntque ei filii Ammon in tempore illo centum talenta argenti, et decem millia coros tritici, ac totidem coros hordei : hæc ei præbuerunt filii Ammon in anno secundo et tertio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠ה֠וּא נִלְחַ֞ם עִם־מֶ֣לֶךְ בְּנֵֽי־עַמּוֹן֮ וַיֶּחֱזַ֣ק עֲלֵיהֶם֒ וַיִּתְּנוּ־ל֨וֹ בְנֵי־עַמּ֜וֹן בַּשָּׁנָ֣ה הַהִ֗יא מֵאָה֙ כִּכַּר־כֶּ֔סֶף וַעֲשֶׂ֨רֶת אֲלָפִ֤ים כֹּרִים֙ חִטִּ֔ים וּשְׂעוֹרִ֖ים עֲשֶׂ֣רֶת אֲלָפִ֑ים זֹ֗את הֵשִׁ֤יבוּ לוֹ֙ בְּנֵ֣י עַמּ֔וֹן וּבַשָּׁנָ֥ה הַשֵּׁנִ֖ית וְהַשְּׁלִשִֽׁית׃
verses.douay_rheims: He fought against the king of the children of Ammon, and overcame them, and the children of Ammon gave him at that time a hundred talents of silver, and ten thousand measures of wheat, and as many measures of barley: so much did the children of Ammon give him in the second and third year.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän soti Ammonin lasten kuninkaan kanssa, ja voitti heidät, niin että Ammonin lapset antoivat sinä vuonna hänelle sata leiviskää hopiaa, kymmenentuhatta koria nisuja ja kymmenentuhatta koria ohria. Niin paljon antoivat myös Ammonin lapset hänelle toisena ja kolmantena vuonna.
verses.king_james: He fought also with the king of the Ammonites, and prevailed against them. And the children of Ammon gave him the same year an hundred talents of silver, and ten thousand measures of wheat, and ten thousand of barley. So much did the children of Ammon pay unto him, both the second year, and the third.

verses.latin_vulgate: Corroboratusque est Joatham, eo quod direxisset vias suas coram Domino Deo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְחַזֵּ֖ק יוֹתָ֑ם כִּ֚י הֵכִ֣ין דְּרָכָ֔יו לִפְנֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joatham was strengthened, because he had his way directed before the Lord his God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin tuli Jotam voimalliseksi; sillä hän toimitti tiensä oikein Herran Jumalan edessä.
verses.king_james: So Jotham became mighty, because he prepared his ways before the Lord his God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Joatham, et omnes pugnæ ejus et opera, scripta sunt in libro regum Israël et Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֙תֶר֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י יוֹתָ֔ם וְכׇל־מִלְחֲמֹתָ֖יו וּדְרָכָ֑יו הִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֔ים עַל־סֵ֥פֶר מַלְכֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וִיהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the rest of the acts of Joatham, and all his wars, and his works, are written in the book of the kings of Israel and Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempää Jotamista sanomista on, ja kaikista hänen sodistansa ja teistänsä: katso, ne ovat kirjoitetut Israelin ja Juudan kuningasten kirjassa.
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, and all his wars, and his ways, lo, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viginti quinque annorum erat cum regnare cœpisset, et sedecim annis regnavit in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־עֶשְׂרִ֧ים וְחָמֵ֛שׁ שָׁנָ֖ה הָיָ֣ה בְמׇלְכ֑וֹ וְשֵׁשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was five and twenty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viidenkolmattakymmenen vuoden vanha oli hän tulessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kuusitoistakymmentä vuotta Jerusalemissa.
verses.king_james: He was five and twenty years old when he began to reign, and reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dormivitque Joatham cum patribus suis, et sepelierunt eum in civitate David : et regnavit Achaz filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב יוֹתָם֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקְבְּר֥וּ אֹת֖וֹ בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֑יד וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אָחָ֥ז בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Joatham slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David: and Achaz his son reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jotam nukkui isäinsä kanssa, ja he hautasivat hänen Davidin kaupunkiin. Ja hänen poikansa Ahas tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David: and Ahaz his son reigned in his stead.
